full_text:
Man Chong (Boning) 滿寵 (伯寧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Man Chong (滿寵), styledBoning (伯寧), was born in Shangyang. Served Cao Cao as Military Aide. Helped to repel Shu’s fifth northern campaign. Man Chong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Man Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
